# MOX Consulting

> MOX Consulting helps small businesses and nonprofits clean up messy data, automate repetitive manual work, and add practical AI — so their teams stop living in spreadsheets. Based in Wendell, NC; serving Raleigh and Wake County. Founded by Frank Mozingo, a data and systems engineer with 12+ years building production data pipelines and automation, who has delivered over $44,500/year in documented cost savings running operations from the inside.

## What MOX Consulting does

- Data cleanup & organization: fix messy, scattered data so systems work together.
- Workflow automation: stop copying data between apps and doing the same tasks by hand.
- Systems integration: make existing tools talk to each other automatically.
- Dashboards & reporting: clear, real-time visibility without building reports by hand.
- Practical AI implementation: simple, useful AI that saves time (the last step, after clean data).

## How it works

- Free Systems Review: a no-cost 60–90 minute review that identifies the biggest time-wasters and delivers a one-page roadmap to keep.
- Fixed-price build: typically $2,500–$5,000, scoped up front, usually 2–4 weeks.
- Optional monthly support: $300–$750/month.
- Built on open-source, self-hosted tools (PostgreSQL, NocoDB, n8n, Caddy). The client owns all data — full export anytime, no vendor lock-in.

## Who it's for

- Small and mid-sized businesses (roughly 2–30 people) drowning in spreadsheets and disconnected apps.
- Small nonprofits with the same problem.
- Not a fit for medical/dental (HIPAA) or defense/aerospace (ITAR/CMMC).
